item.description:
New:
  • Bring back the year filter from the Tauri HeaderBar
  • Aurora wallpaper + liquid-glass design system
  • Menu-bar nav + popover hero orchestration
  • Glass panels everywhere + v1.x copy + melting popsicle
  • /zh-tw/ locale + hreflang
  • 1200x630 OG brand card + JSON-LD/llms.txt refresh
  • Oiiai cat + Party Parrot join the critter band
  • Og-card v2 with real popover + sharper title/description
  • Real app icon beside the TokenBar wordmark
  • FAQPage JSON-LD, sitemap hreflang, self-hosted fonts
  • Standalone settings window with live preview column
  • Credit contributors in AI release notes
Fixes:
  • Let the brew command wrap inside a 350px column
  • App-icon favicon, straighten 3D card, 2x hero popover
  • Drop the Apple logo glyph from menu-bar mocks
  • Drive the popsicle melt with JavaScript — WebKit lacks CSS d:path()
  • Waifu2x upscale for the hero popover — crisper text
  • Open the settings window dead-center on screen
  • Never mtime-prune Hermes/Zed dbs; probe their -wal sidecars
  • Stop re-reading and re-aggregating unchanged session history

Thanks: @aiexkwan
